---
title: "Exchange Rate Determination"
author: "Akash"
institute: "MRIIRS"
format: dashboard
titlepage: true
titlepage-full: true
---

---

# Graph

## Section-1{height=40%}

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(plotly)
library(bslib)
library(bsicons)
data<-mtcars
p1<-ggplot(data,aes(mpg,wt,colour = mpg,size=gear))+geom_point()
ggplotly(p1)
```

```{r}
ggplotly(p1)
```

## Section-2 {.tabset}  

### Tab-1

```{r}
ggplotly(p1)
```

### Tab-2

```{r}
ggplotly(p1)
```

## Section-3
###
The graph compares miles per gallon (mpg) against weight (wt) across different ranges. The values span mpg from about 10 to 35 and weight from 2 to 5. Two tabs of data are referenced (Tab‑1 and Tab‑2)

###
Now it is a real test 

# Tables

# Summary
